prose.title: 70b mos
prose.body: The 70B Military Occupation Specialty (MOS) is the Health Services Manager. As a 70B, your primary responsibilities would include planning and coordinating healthcare services within a military medical treatment facility. This may include managing personnel, resources, and budgets, as well as overseeing the delivery of patient care and ensuring compliance with policies and regulations. Additionally, you may also be involved in healthcare policy development and implementation.
